entries.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
entries.description: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

entries.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
entries.description: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

entries.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
entries.description: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

entries.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
entries.description: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

entries.title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B, but says growth was capacity-constrained
entries.description: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.

entries.title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
entries.description: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

entries.title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
entries.description: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. The New York-based company has raised close to $860 million at a $5.3 billion

entries.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
entries.description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

entries.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
entries.description: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

entries.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
entries.description: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

entries.title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
entries.description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

entries.title: Meet Shapes, the app bringing humans and AI into the same group chats
entries.description: Think Discord chats, but with AI characters in addition to humans.

entries.title: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war: We visited its bootcamp
entries.description: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.

entries.title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
entries.description: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

entries.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
